extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won the sprint in Valance after Deceuninck-QuickStep shut down Colbrelli's aggressive pre-intermediate sprint attack, taking stage win #33.
tactical_patterns: Colbrelli pre-intermediate sprint attack tested Deceuninck's commitment before green jersey points; UAE countered showing dual sprint interest.
Deceuninck rode full gas entire stage for Cavendish despite category 4 climb rather than conserving for breakaway neutralization.
Pogacar isolated with only 1-2 teammates in crosswind sections but personally strong enough to self-position without full support.

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Confident enough to commit team to full pursuit despite category 4 climb concern, now 59pts clear in green
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: Probing Deceuninck's sprint commitment with aggressive pre-intermediate sprint move rather than conserving energy
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Tactically secure in crosswinds despite thin teammate support, able to self-position on flat dangerous sections
rider_signals.VAN DER SANDE Tosh: neutral: First Tour breakaway after 9 years pro, no tactical significance
